item.name: Pumpkin Butler
item.description:
Oft-forgotten member of the Mandragoras, if the Pumpkin Butler harbors any ill will for those who have so easily forsaken him, he does a fine job of hiding it.

Use item to acquire the Pumpkin Butler minion.
item.tooltip:
Pumpkins sort of remind
me of...um... No, it's gone.
Never mind!
   - Nashu Mhakaracca
item.specialactiondescription:
Reduces ATK of all enemies within range by 50%.
Duration: 15s
